cards.title: Problem Form and Growth
cards.governance_note: Define decision, search, optimization, counting, or online form and identify input dimensions.

cards.title: Exactness and Alternatives
cards.governance_note: Document when exact methods fail and what approximation, heuristic, relaxation, or reformulation is used.

cards.title: Timeouts and Limits
cards.governance_note: Report timeouts, hard cases, fallback behavior, solver logs, and communication of limits.
